title: pthread_mutex_t should not be locked when already locked, or unlocked when already unlocked
description: Mutexes are synchronization primitives that allow to manage concurrency. This is the most fundamental building block for creating safe concurrent applications. By using a mutex, one can ensure that a block of code is executed by a single thread concurrently.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Mutex violation detected - improper mutex usage pattern found
